    }
};

solution: ```class Solution {
public:
    int accountBalanceAfterPurchase(int purchaseAmount) {
        int rounded = ((purchaseAmount + 5) / 10) * 10;
        return 100 - rounded;
    }
};```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution calculates the rounded purchase amount by adding 5 and using integer division to round to the nearest multiple of 10. This handles all edge cases efficiently with simple arithmetic operations. The key strength is its constant-time performance, while the weakness is that it relies on integer truncation behavior in C++ division.
